summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Terre de Beauce ERP system. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Full CRUD operations tested for tracteurs, equipements, chauffeurs, clients, and chantiers with affectations. Navigation, dashboard statistics, and planning calendar all functional.
passed_tests: Dashboard statistics endpoint returns correct data structure
Tracteur CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Equipement CRUD operations with type filtering
Client CRUD operations with SIREN/SIRET/TVA fields
Chantier CRUD operations with affectations enrichment
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Flotte, Chauffeurs, Clients, Chantiers, Planning)
Flotte page - Tracteur creation and management
Flotte page - Equipment creation (remorques, citernes, bennes) with tabs
Chauffeurs page - Driver management with availability status
Clients page - Client management with French business fields
Chantiers page - Work site creation with complex affectations
Planning page - Calendar view with chantier display
Real-time statistics updates after data creation
Form validation and user feedback (toast notifications)
